page.title: Present Perfect Continuous: Questions and Short Answers
page.subtitle_html: Present Perfect Continuous: Questions and Short Answers — Have you been...?, Has she been...?, How long have they been...?

blocks.body: {"level":"A2–B1","intro":"У питаннях Present Perfect Continuous ми ставимо have / has перед підметом, а далі беремо been + V-ing.","rules":[{"label":"Have I / you / we / they been ...?","color":"emerald","text":"З цими підметами починай питання з have.","example":"Have you been waiting long?"},{"label":"Has he / she / it been ...?","color":"blue","text":"З he / she / it використовуй has.","example":"Has she been working today?"},{"label":"How long ...?","color":"amber","text":"Питання з How long дуже часті, коли говоримо про тривалість до тепер.","example":"How long have they been living here?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"violet","text":"У короткій відповіді повторюй have / has або haven't / hasn't.","example":"Yes, I have. / No, she hasn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Базові моделі питання","intro":"У питанні спочатку йде have або has, а потім been + V-ing.","items":[{"label":"I / you / we / they","title":"Have ... been + V-ing?","subtitle":"Have you been studying? / Have they been waiting long?"},{"label":"he / she / it","title":"Has ... been + V-ing?","subtitle":"Has he been working? / Has it been raining?"},{"label":"How long","title":"How long have / has ... been + V-ing?","subtitle":"How long have you been learning English?"},{"label":"Short answers","title":"Yes, ... have / has. No, ... haven't / hasn't.","subtitle":"Yes, I have. / No, he hasn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Для чого ці питання","sections":[{"label":"Про тривалість","color":"emerald","description":"Питай, скільки часу триває дія до теперішнього моменту.","examples":[{"en":"How long have you been waiting?","ua":"Скільки часу ти чекаєш?"},{"en":"How long has she been working here?","ua":"Скільки часу вона тут працює?"}]},{"label":"Про теперішню або недавню активність","color":"blue","description":"Питай, чи людина була в якомусь процесі недавно або зараз.","examples":[{"en":"Have you been studying all morning?","ua":"Ти вчився весь ранок?"},{"en":"Has he been sleeping well lately?","ua":"Він добре спить останнім часом?"}]},{"label":"Про видимий результат","color":"amber","description":"Питання часто пояснюють теперішній результат через недавній процес.","examples":[{"en":"Why are you tired? Have you been running?","ua":"Чому ти втомлений? Ти бігав?"},{"en":"Has she been crying?","ua":"Вона плакала?"}]}]}

{"title":"3. Питання і коротка відповідь","intro":"У відповіді повторюй have / has, а не все речення.","rows":[{"en":"Have you been waiting long?","ua":"Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.","note":"have → have / haven't"},{"en":"Has she been working today?","ua":"Yes, she has. / No, she hasn't.","note":"has → has / hasn't"},{"en":"How long have they been living here?","ua":"For two years.","note":"питання про тривалість"}],"warning":"Не кажи Has she been work? або Yes, she have."}

{"title":"4. Типові помилки","items":[{"label":"Помилка 1","color":"rose","title":"Ставити have / has після підмета, а не перед ним.","wrong":"❌ She has been working today?","right":"✅ Has she been working today?"},{"label":"Помилка 2","color":"amber","title":"Пропускати been у питанні.","wrong":"❌ Have you studying long?","right":"✅ Have you been studying long?"},{"label":"Помилка 3","color":"sky","title":"Будувати How long з неправильним порядком слів.","wrong":"❌ How long you have been waiting?","right":"✅ How long have you been waiting?"}]}

{"title":"5. Короткий підсумок","items":["Питання в Present Perfect Continuous = Have / Has + subject + been + V-ing.","З I / you / we / they використовуй have.","З he / she / it використовуй has.","How long дуже часто вживається для тривалості до тепер.","У коротких відповідях повторюй have / has або haven't / hasn't."]}

{"title":"Уроки Present Perfect Continuous","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-forms","current":false},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-questions","current":true},{"label":"Time Expressions","url":"/theory/present-perfect-continuous/present-perfect-continuous-time-expressions","current":false}]}
